title: phyllanthus subapicalis
intro: Phyllanthus subapicalis, also known as the Asian Schröter or Manjukara, is a species of plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phyllanthus subapicalis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate symptoms of various respiratory infections, and exhibit hepatoprotective effects. Herbal preparations of Phyllanthus subapicalis can be found in the form of extracts, teas, and infusions, and are often used in traditional medicine practices in certain parts of Asia.
